prompt:
You are a PROOF-FILLER. Replace the `sorry` placeholders for the listed declarations with complete, type-correct Lean proofs. Do NOT change statement signatures; do NOT weaken hypotheses.

Lean files live under: /<repo-root>/CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/KlDensityTiltExpansion
Target declarations: CausalSmith.Substrate.KlDensityTiltExpansion.klDiv_tiltMeasure_toReal_eq, CausalSmith.Substrate.KlDensityTiltExpansion.abs_klRemainder_le, CausalSmith.Substrate.KlDensityTiltExpansion.klDiv_tilt_expansion

## Instructions
Fill the 3 `sorry`s in /<repo-root>/CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/KlDensityTiltExpansion/KLExpansion.lean. Do NOT change any statement, signature, or imports. You MAY rely on the lemmas already stated in the sibling files Basic.lean (`tiltMeasure`, `tiltMeasure_absolutelyContinuous`, `tiltDensity_nonneg`, `integrable_of_bounded`, `integral_tiltDensity`, `isProbabilityMeasure_tiltMeasure`) and CubicRemainder.lean (`abs_tiltRemainder_le`) вҖ” treat them as available (they may still contain sorries; that's fine, use their statements). Verify with `cd /<repo-root>/CausalSmith && lake build CausalSmith.Substrate.KlDensityTiltExpansion.KLExpansion` (zero errors; the only sorries remaining anywhere should be ones in the sibling files you were told not to touch).

`open MeasureTheory InformationTheory Real Filter Topology Asymptotics`. Key Mathlib API (confirm signatures with lean-lsp `lean_hover_info`):
- `InformationTheory.toReal_klDiv_of_measure_eq : Ој вүӘ ОҪ вҶ’ Ој Set.univ = ОҪ Set.univ вҶ’ (klDiv Ој ОҪ).toReal = вҲ« a, llr Ој ОҪ a вҲӮОј`.
- `MeasureTheory.llr_def : llr Ој ОҪ = fun x => Real.log (Ој.rnDeriv ОҪ x).toReal`.
- `MeasureTheory.Measure.rnDeriv_withDensity (ОҪ) [SigmaFinite ОҪ] {f} (hf : Measurable f) : (ОҪ.withDensity f).rnDeriv ОҪ =бөҗ[ОҪ] f`.
- `MeasureTheory.integral_withDensity_eq_integral_toReal_smul (hf : Measurable f) (h_lt_top : вҲҖбөҗ x вҲӮОј, f x < вҠӨ) (g) : вҲ« x, g x вҲӮ(Ој.withDensity f) = вҲ« x, (f x).toReal вҖў g x вҲӮОј`.
- `Asymptotics.isLittleO_iff : f =o[l] g вҶ” вҲҖ c > 0, вҲҖб¶  x in l, вҖ–f xвҖ– вүӨ c * вҖ–g xвҖ–`.

(1) `klDiv_tiltMeasure_toReal_eq` (hyps incl. `hh : |h|*C вүӨ 1`): Let `ОҪ := tiltMeasure Ој s h = Ој.withDensity (fun y => ENNReal.ofReal (1 + h*s y))`. Establish `haveI : IsProbabilityMeasure ОҪ := isProbabilityMeasure_tiltMeasure hs_meas hsC hs_mean hh` and `hac : ОҪ вүӘ Ој := tiltMeasure_absolutelyContinuous ..`. Apply `toReal_klDiv_of_measure_eq hac (by simp [measure_univ])` to get `(klDiv ОҪ Ој).toReal = вҲ« a, llr ОҪ Ој a вҲӮОҪ`. Rewrite `llr ОҪ Ој` a.e.[ОҪ]: `rnDeriv ОҪ Ој =бөҗ[Ој] fun y => ENNReal.ofReal (1 + h*s y)` (rnDeriv_withDensity, density measurable), transfer to a.e.[ОҪ] via `hac`; combined with `ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (tiltDensity_nonneg ..)`, `llr ОҪ Ој =бөҗ[ОҪ] fun y => Real.log (1 + h*s y)`. So `вҲ« llr ОҪ Ој вҲӮОҪ = вҲ« y, Real.log (1 + h*s y) вҲӮОҪ` (integral_congr_ae). Then change of measure with `integral_withDensity_eq_integral_toReal_smul` (density < вҠӨ a.e. since ofReal): `= вҲ« y, (ENNReal.ofReal (1+h*s y)).toReal вҖў Real.log (1+h*s y) вҲӮОј = вҲ« y, (1 + h*s y) * Real.log (1 + h*s y) вҲӮОј` (toReal_ofReal + tiltDensity_nonneg, `smul_eq_mul`).

(2) `abs_klRemainder_le` (hyps incl. `hC : 0 вүӨ C`, `hh : |h|*C вүӨ 1/2`): First `rw [klDiv_tiltMeasure_toReal_eq hs_meas hsC hs_mean (by linarith [abs_nonneg h])]` (note |h|*C вүӨ 1/2 вҮ’ вүӨ 1). Define pointwise `R y := (1 + h*s y)*Real.log (1+h*s y) - (h*s y) - (h*s y)^2/2`. Show `вҲ« y,(1+h*s y)*log(1+h*s y) вҲӮОј - (h^2/2)*вҲ« s^2 = вҲ« y, R y вҲӮОј`: because `(1+h*s y)*log(1+h*s y) = (h*s y) + (h*s y)^2/2 + R y`, and `вҲ« (h*s y) = h*вҲ« s = 0`, `вҲ« (h*s y)^2/2 = (h^2/2)*вҲ« s^2` (`(h*s y)^2 = h^2*(s y)^2`, pull constants; use integral_add/integral_const_mul; all pieces integrable вҖ” products/powers of bounded measurable functions on a finite measure, build via `integrable_of_bounded`-style bounds or `Integrable.bdd_mul`). Then `|вҲ« R| вүӨ вҲ« |R|` (`abs_integral_le_integral_abs`) `вүӨ вҲ« y, |h*s y|^3 вҲӮОј` (integral_mono, pointwise `abs_tiltRemainder_le` with x = h*s y, whose hyp `|h*s y| вүӨ 1/2` holds since `|h*s y| = |h|*|s y| вүӨ |h|*C вүӨ 1/2`) `вүӨ вҲ« y, (C^3*|h|^3) вҲӮОј = C^3*|h|^3` (`|h*s y|^3 = |h|^3*|s y|^3 вүӨ |h|^3*C^3`; integral_const + probability measure). Provide integrability witnesses for each `integral_mono`/`integral_add`.

(3) `klDiv_tilt_expansion` (MAIN): First derive `hC : 0 вүӨ C` (prob measure вҮ’ Nonempty Z; pick a point, `le_trans (abs_nonneg _) (hsC _)` вҖ” or mirror `nonempty_of_isProbabilityMeasure` in Submodel.lean). Then `rw [Asymptotics.isLittleO_iff]; intro c hc`. Need `вҲҖб¶  h in рқ“қ 0, вҖ–remainder hвҖ– вүӨ c*вҖ–h^2вҖ–`. Work `Filter.eventually`: (i) `вҲҖб¶  h in рқ“қ 0, |h|*C вүӨ 1/2` (continuity of `h вҶҰ |h|*C` at 0, value 0 < 1/2 вҖ” use `Filter.Tendsto`/`ContinuousAt` + `eventually_le` or `Metric.eventually_nhds_iff`); (ii) `вҲҖб¶  h in рқ“қ 0, C^3*|h| вүӨ c` (same, value 0 вүӨ c). Combine with `Filter.eventually_of...`/`.mono`: for such h, `вҖ–remainder hвҖ– = |remainder h| вүӨ C^3*|h|^3` (abs_klRemainder_le hC .. this-h) `= (C^3*|h|)*|h|^2 вүӨ c*|h|^2 = c*вҖ–h^2вҖ–` (`вҖ–h^2вҖ– = |h^2| = |h|^2`; `Real.norm_eq_abs`, `abs_pow`, `pow_abs`; finish with `nlinarith`/`mul_le_mul`). 

Use lean-lsp `lean_goal`/`lean_multi_attempt` throughout to check intermediate states and confirm exact lemma names. Keep each proof focused; factor local `have`s for the integrability side-goals.

Use the lean-lsp MCP tools to check your proof (diagnostics/goal). When done, output a SHORT plain-text report: which decls you closed, which remain, and any blocker. No JSON required.
